digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.title: Digitally Sign First Page of PDF
digitally-sign-first-page-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF using PdfFileSignature, configure a certificate, add a visible digital signature to page 1, and save the signed document.

add-multiple-digital-signatures-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Digital Signatures to PDF
add-multiple-digital-signatures-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply two digital signatures on different pages and rectangle areas of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

sign-pdf-with-custom-appearance.title: Sign PDF with Custom Appearance (Foreground Image & Background Color)
sign-pdf-with-custom-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, configuring a custom signature appearance that includes a foreground image and a background color.

sign-pdf-suppress-reason-location.title: Sign PDF and Suppress Signature Reason and Location
sign-pdf-suppress-reason-location.description: Demonstrates digitally signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades while hiding the reason and location fields by assigning empty strings before signing.

sign-pdf-french-appearance.title: Sign PDF with French Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-french-appearance.description: Demonstrates digitally signing a PDF with a visible signature image and setting the signature's custom appearance locale to French using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Signature from PDF
remove-signature-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete an existing digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save the result.

verify-specific-pdf-signature.title: Verify Specific PDF Signature Using PdfFileSignature
verify-specific-pdf-signature.description: Shows how to locate a signature named 'ContractSigner' in a PDF and verify it with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

validate-pdf-signature-field.title: Validate PDF Signature Field Using Aspose.Pdf
validate-pdf-signature-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, bind it to the PdfFileSignature facade, and verify the cryptographic integrity of a specific signature field (ManagerSignature).

extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature Field
extract-signing-certificate-from-pdf.description: Shows how to retrieve the X.509 signing certificate from a specific signature field in a PDF and save it as a .cer file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-signature-image-png.title: Extract Signature Image and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-png.description: Shows how to extract the image of a PDF signature field named "WitnessSignature" using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and convert it to a PNG file.

custom-signature-appearance-hide-caption.title: Create Custom Signature Appearance Without 'Digitally signed by' Caption
custom-signature-appearance-hide-caption.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and hide the default "Digitally signed by" label by disabling signature properties or providing a custom appearance.

sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-pfx-certificate.description: Demonstrates digitally signing a PDF with a password‑protected PFX certificate and optionally adding a visible signature appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-pdf-signature-with-missing-field-.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing-Field Handling
remove-pdf-signature-with-missing-field-.description: Demonstrates how to remove a named digital signature from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with graceful handling when the signature does not exist.

verify-pdf-signatures-to-json.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Export Results to JSON
verify-pdf-signatures-to-json.description: Loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and writes the signature name and validation status to a formatted JSON file.

sign-and-verify-pdf-using-pdffilesignatu.title: Sign and Verify PDF Using PdfFileSignature
sign-and-verify-pdf-using-pdffilesignatu.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with a PFX certificate using PdfFileSignature and then verify the signature's authenticity.

sign-pdf-with-reason-and-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason and Location
sign-pdf-with-reason-and-location.description: Demonstrates digitally signing a PDF using a PFX certificate and setting the signature reason and location via Aspose.Pdf.

create-and-sign-pdf-signature-field.title: Create and Sign a PDF Signature Field on a Specific Page
create-and-sign-pdf-signature-field.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a chosen page of a PDF and then sign it using a certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature Field
extract-certificate-details-from-pdf-sig.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and extract the X.509 certificate to read issuer and expiration information.

generate-pdf-signature-report.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
generate-pdf-signature-report.description: Creates a PDF report that lists each digital signature in a signed document, showing signer, validity, reason, location, date, revision and coverage information.

retry-sign-pdf-when-file-locked.title: Retry Signing PDF When File Is Locked
retry-sign-pdf-when-file-locked.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while handling file‑lock conflicts by implementing a retry loop with configurable attempts and delay.

remove-all-pdf-signatures.title: Remove All Signatures from a PDF
remove-all-pdf-signatures.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to strip all digital signatures from a PDF document and save a clean copy.

verify-multiple-signatures-pdf.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in a PDF
verify-multiple-signatures-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a signed PDF, retrieving all signature names, and verifying each signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-signature-images-html-report.title: Extract Signature Images and Generate HTML Report
extract-signature-images-html-report.description: Demonstrates extracting digital signature images from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and embedding them as Base64 data URIs in an HTML report for visual inspection.

apply-semi-transparent-signature-appeara.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Signature Appearance to PDF
apply-semi-transparent-signature-appeara.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a semi‑transparent PNG image as the visual signature appearance, improving document readability.

list-pdf-signature-names.title: List Signature Names in a PDF Document
list-pdf-signature-names.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to retrieve and display all non‑empty signature names contained in a PDF file.

sign-pdf-with-visible-image.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
sign-pdf-with-visible-image.description: Demonstrates how to apply a visible signature image to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, optionally attaching a certificate and saving the signed file.

sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
sign-pdf-visible-signature-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and add a visible signature image positioned at the bottom‑right corner of the last page.

add-locale-specific-visible-signatures.title: Add Locale‑Specific Visible Signatures to PDF
add-locale-specific-visible-signatures.description: Signs a PDF on multiple pages with visible signatures, each using a different culture (German, Spanish, Japanese) by configuring SignatureCustomAppearance.Culture.

remove-signature-re-sign-pdf.title: Remove Existing Signature and Re‑sign PDF with New Certificate
remove-signature-re-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove any existing digital signatures from a PDF and then apply a new signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

verify-pdf-no-signatures-false.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
verify-pdf-no-signatures-false.description: Shows how to detect that a PDF contains no signatures and confirms that the VerifySigned method returns false for an unsigned document.

remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs-recursiv.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
remove-all-signatures-from-pdfs-recursiv.description: Demonstrates how to traverse a directory tree, load each PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, remove all embedded signatures, and overwrite the original file.

extract-certificate-serial-number-from-p.title: Extract and Log Certificate Serial Number from PDF Signature
extract-certificate-serial-number-from-p.description: The example opens a signed PDF, verifies the presence of digital signatures, extracts each signature's X.509 certificate, and logs the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

audit-pdf-signatures-reason-location.title: Audit PDF Signatures: List Reason and Location
audit-pdf-signatures-reason-location.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to read digital signatures from a PDF and retrieve each signature's reason and location for auditing purposes.

create-invisible-pdf-digital-signature.title: Create an Invisible Digital Signature for a PDF
create-invisible-pdf-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with a cryptographically valid digital signature while completely hiding the visual appearance using Aspose.Pdf facades.

extract-the-signing-certificate-s-subjec.title: Extract The Signing Certificate S Subject Distinguished Name And Store It In A Database
